title: duplicate file_scope fixture
problem: Two sibling subtasks share the same file_scope path. The validator must flag this as a fatal error (overlap detection rule b). Used by run-plan-validator-cases.sh to assert exit code 3.
acceptance_criteria: Every sub-task lands as an independent PR with verifiable evidence in the PR body and CI gate passes.

tasks.title: alpha
tasks.description: Alpha sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. The fixture deliberately overlaps file_scope with the beta sub-task below to exercise the validator's pairwise overlap detection logic and trigger a fatal exit.

tasks.title: beta
tasks.description: Beta sub-task description padded to satisfy the >=200 char rule. The fixture deliberately shares its file_scope with alpha above so the validator emits a file_scope overlap error and exits 3 as documented in plan-validator.sh.
